design_philosophy.description: A high-fidelity, high-contrast scientific instrument interface. It prioritizes data legibility, precision interactions, and long-session comfort. No decorative gradients; only functional colors.

buttons.primary: bg-zinc-100 text-zinc-900 hover:bg-zinc-200 rounded-sm font-medium text-xs px-4 h-8
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-800 text-zinc-100 hover:bg-zinc-700 rounded-sm font-medium text-xs px-4 h-8 border border-zinc-700
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-zinc-800 text-zinc-400 hover:text-zinc-100 rounded-sm text-xs px-3 h-8
buttons.icon: h-8 w-8 p-0 rounded-sm hover:bg-zinc-800 text-zinc-400 hover:text-zinc-100

cards.interactive: bg-[#0c0c0e] border border-zinc-800 rounded-sm p-4 hover:border-zinc-700 transition-colors cursor-pointer

inputs.base: bg-zinc-950 border-zinc-800 focus:border-zinc-600 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-zinc-600 rounded-sm h-8 text-xs font-mono

trace_viewer.container: relative w-full h-[50vh] bg-black border-y border-zinc-800 overflow-hidden
trace_viewer.toolbar: flex items-center gap-2 bg-zinc-900/50 border-b border-zinc-800 p-2 backdrop-blur-sm sticky top-0 z-10

charts.trace: Plotly.js (via react-plotly.js) or Recharts (with heavy decimation for performance)

universal_guidelines: Always use a dark theme by default.
Do not use rounded-xl or rounded-2xl; stick to rounded-sm or rounded-md for a technical feel.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for all numerical values and data tables.
Ensure the trace viewer takes up the maximum available space.
Use 'Sonner' for notifications (file upload success, error).
Add data-testid to all interactive elements.
instructions_to_main_agent: Modify 'tailwind.config.js' to include the specific colors defined in 'colors' section.
Create a 'Layout' component that enforces the dark theme and strict spacing.
Implement the 'Trace Viewer' using Plotly for performance with large datasets, or Recharts if Plotly is too complex, but ensure decimation is used.
Use the 'Manrope' font for headers. Add it via Google Fonts in index.html or CSS.
